## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      4 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jun 16, 2026 - Jun 16, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Danny Trobec_, Jun 16, 2026, 1/5: "app keeps on crashing and giving me an error message that my device is not up to date even though it's running android 16"
            2. _Vinay Kumar_, 4/5: "Subject: App Not Compatible with Moto Edge 60 Pro Hello Developer Team, I am using a Moto Edge 60 Pro, but I am unable to download your app from the Google Play Store because it says "This app isn't compatible with your device." My device details: Device: Moto Edge 60 Pro Issue: App is not compatible and cannot be downloaded from the Play Store. Please check whether there is a compatibility issue with the Moto Edge 60 Pro and let me know if a fix or update is planned. thank you"
            3. _Vinaya H R_, 4/5: "I am using Moto Edge 60 Pro with Android 16 (latest version). Habit Genius is showing “not compatible” on the Play Store, so I cannot install it normally. I also tried installing it via APK from another phone, but it still does not open. My device shows a warning “this app might be harmful” and blocks it from running. This seems like an Android 16 compatibility issue or a Play Protect/app signing problem. Please check device compatibility and update the app so it works on newer Android versions"
